For getting success either in business or profession the 51~"~ and lOU'
houses are the two most important houses for consideration. The st~~
house stands for intellect <Budhi), talent. children. belly, Vedic knowledge,
Poorva·Punya Sthana (virtuous act done in past life). amusements,
affections, conception, creativity (artistic and literary output), dramatic
abiity, inclination to express clearly. love affairs, romance. sex. ilvestments,
gambling, speculation etc.
Its key word is creativity. In the stn house. life becomes
venturesome. here romance have fun. The operational system of Laws
of Chance are operated by the fifth house. It is also the house of pride
and fame.
